title: Task argument inherits width of value that was passed to it

features.name: task implicit single-bit input port with unsized constant argument
features.description: Code should include a task with an implicit single-bit input port (declared without explicit range, e.g., 'input wire d') called with an unsized integer constant (e.g., 0), where the formal port should retain its declared 1-bit width rather than inheriting the 32-bit width of the passed constant

features.name: bit concatenation of task formal port with implicit width
features.description: Code should include a bit concatenation inside a task body that combines a multi-bit input port and a single-bit implicit-width port, where the concatenation result width depends on the formal port's declared width (1 bit) not the actual argument's width

features.name: task call width coercion from actual to formal port
features.description: Code should include a task invocation where the actual argument is an unsized integer literal (implicitly 32-bit) passed to a narrower formal port, testing that the formal port is truncated to its declared width at the call site
